			"C_o":431.307,
			"a":2.93063e-07,
			"C_x":1e+06,
			"iter":10,
			"sei":0.107263,
			"ses":0.0032504,
			"r2":0.993517,
			"slope":0.292936,
			"domain":54,
			"n":55
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
